nasb.text: “You shall make a veil of blue and purple and scarlet material and fine twisted linen; it shall be made with cherubim, the work of a skillful workman.

esv.text: “And you shall make a veil of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen. It shall be made with cherubim skillfully worked into it.

cnv.text: “你要用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做幔幕，並且要用巧工繡上基路伯。

ccb.text: “要用细麻线和蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线织成一幅幔子，上面用精致的手工绣上基路伯天使。
